problem id: dbc4194a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6) AND SHR(5)

examples:
  01000101 -> 00000000
  00111100 -> 00000001
  01111010 -> 00000010
  00111110 -> 00000001
  10001010 -> 00000000
  00101000 -> 00000000
  00010100 -> 00000000
  11110100 -> 00000101
  00111011 -> 00000000
  11100011 -> 00000000

query: 00011001
predicted answer: 00000000
